Careers
Join a Winning Team

At NANOWAVE Technologies Inc. we know that to become a leading designer and manufacturer servicing the aerospace, avionics, defense and communications industry worldwide, we must have some of the best minds in the industry working together to serve our customers. Our team of experts is not only strong individually, but work together to understand the customer’s problems and provide optimized solutions.

Together our team continues to develop and incorporate our core technologies to develop innovative products to service our customers worldwide.

NANOWAVE is an innovative and entrepreneurial organization, built on the expertise of its people. We are committed to attracting and retaining the best employees, as we continue to grow and expand our presence in the industry. In addition to the opportunity to share in NANOWAVE’s growth, we offer our employees a competitive salary, benefits package and a dynamic work environment.

If you are skilled and interested working with a winning team in one of the following fields, please send us your resume at careers@nanowavetech.com.

RF Engineering
MMIC Circuit Design
Mechanical Engineering
New Product Introduction
	
AESA module designer
Space qualification engineer
Thin film process
Eng
